| Yes via MADIP;Data Exchange (DEX) | Curated dataset for sharing de-identified data for analytical projects, including data integration or program evaluation. | De-identified | Yes |
| DOMINO | Data Over Multiple Individual Occurrences covering income support and welfare payments. | Yes | Yes (via AIHW Data Integration Services) |
| DSS Payment and Programme Data | Administrative data on Commonwealth welfare payments and program participation. | Yes | Yes |
